channel.title: Contributing on Temporary Escape
channel.description: Recent content in Contributing on Temporary Escape

item.title: C++ Dependencies
item.description: C++ Dependencies # In order to build this game from the source you will need the following tools: git Clang compiler with C++17 support or MSVC vcpkg latest version cmake version 3.10 or higher Some additional OS dependencies MinGW or Cygwin Neither MinGW or Cygwin are officially supported. They might work but it is recommended to use Clang or MSVC. Vcpkg must be installed through git

item.title: Building
item.description: Building # Manually building is boring. It is recommended that you use one of the IDEs as described here. 1. Prerequisites # Make sure that you have installed dependencies 2. Cloning # Clone this project including its git submodules. git clone https://github.com/matusnovak/temporary-escape.git git submodule update --init 3. Configure project # Last argument is a dot Don’t forget to specify which folder the CMake should run the configuration from.
